response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack and distributed systems experience, along with a strong commitment to mentoring and testing best practices, they do not meet the core technical requirements for this role. Specifically, they lack the mandatory 8 years of C++ programming experience, possessing only a few months of professional C++ exposure. Furthermore, their background leans toward application development and higher-level cloud services rather than the foundational, low-level cloud compute platform and hardware architecture required for this position.
strengths: Extensive experience building and scaling distributed systems and microservices handling high traffic.
Strong dedication to engineering best practices, particularly TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship.
Proven track record of technical mentoring, organizing workshops, and leading coding dojos.
concerns: Falls critically short of the minimum 8 years of C++ programming experience, with less than a year listed.
Lacks deep, foundational experience building core cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture.
Technical stack is predominantly focused on higher-level application languages (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) rather than systems-level development.
